snippet.title: Nagan Si Lugai Tera Balam Chota (Official Video) Farmani Naaz | New haryanvi Song | Hema| Naaz Music
snippet.description:
#NaganSiLugai #farmaninaaz i #terabalamchota #Naazmusic 

Song  - Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई 
Artist   -  Hema Chaudhary.Rahul Mulheda , Varunesh Baisla
Lyrics  - varunesh baisla , Anuj Mulheda 
Music - Gaurav Panchal (Gr Music -8708626865)
Singer - Farmani Naaz , Manish Tyagi 
Video Shoot - Panchal Productions
Director -  Rahul Mulheda , Nitin Panchal 
Editor - Nitin Panchal 
Publicity Design - Rahul mulheda
Publisher - Naaz Music
Label -   Naaz Music
Production - Rahul Mulheda
Special Thanks - Naaz Music And Team
For any query:- Email - farmaninaaz786@gmail.com

                 Lyrics
Mhare khat khatoli ka na tota
ra mahre khat khatoli ka na tota

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Lakh lakh ke shut ma phru
Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Up ke ma dunga maru halle delhi sari ri
Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri


म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा
र म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा 

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

लाख लाख के सूट मै पहरू सवा लाख की जूती रे
चांदी का मेरा वायरल नाड़ा दिल्ली के मै कोठी र

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

यूपी के मै ढुंगा मारू हाले दिल्ली सारी री
दूर दूर त निगाह गड़ावे रांडे छेल जुहारी री
लव यू भाभी

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

दो बालका की मां बनगी मै लागू कती कवारी सी
ढुंगे मेरे झोल मार र चोटी नाग बनारी री
बीन ही बजा दू क्या

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री

Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई | Official Video Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2024. Nanhe Nanhe Ghungroo Haryanvi Song Starring with farmani naaz hema chaudhary  
This Haryanvi Song Sung by rahul mulheda. Music given manish tyagi. Penned by Ravi Rangi. Copyright & Music label by NAAZ MUSIC

snippet.description:
#hindisong #8kvideosong #girishkumar #lovesongs 

💞 Jeene Laga Hoon in stunning 8K Ultra HD – Fall in love all over again!

This song has been remastered from HD to 8K 60fps for the best possible viewing experience till now.

Watch Girish Kumar & Shruti Haasan's romantic journey unfold with the magical voices of Atif Aslam & Shreya Ghoshal in this unforgettable melody from Ramaiya Vastavaiya. ✨


Song Credits :
Singers : Atif Aslam, Shreya Ghoshal
Music Director : Sachin Jigar
Lyrics Writer: Priya Panchal
Mixed & Mastered By Eric Pillai (Future Sound of Bombay)

Movie Credits :
Starring : Girish Kumar, Shruti Haasan, Sonu Sood, Randhir Kapoor, Poonam Dhillon, Vinod Khanna, Satish Shah, Naseer, Paresh Ganatra
Directed by : Prabhudheva
Produced by : Kumar Taurani
Director of Photography : Kiran Deohans

Song Lyrics :

Main Mera Dil Aur Tum Ho Yahan,
Phir Kyun Ho Palkein Jhukayein Wahan,
Tum Sa Haseen Maine Dekha Nahin,
Tum Isse Pehle The Jaane Kahan...
Jeene Laga Hoon Pehle Se Zyada,
Pehle Se Zyada Tumpe Marne Laga...
Hummm...Hummmm....

Rehte Ho Aa Ke Jo, Tum Paas Mere,
Tham Jaye Pal Yeh Wahin, Bass Main Yeh Sochun...
Sochun Main Tham Jaye Pal Yeh,
Paas Mere Jab Ho Tum...(2)
Chalti Hai Saansein, Pehle Se Zyada Dil Theharne Laga...
Hummmm....Hummmm....

Tanhaiyon Mein Tujhe Dhoondhe Mera Dil,
Har Pal Yeh Tujhko Hi, Soche Bhala Kyun,

Tanhai Mein Dhoondhe Tujhe Dil,
Har Pal Tujhko Soche, (2)
Milne Lage Dil, Pehle Se Zyada,
Pehle Se Zyada, Ishq Hone Laga
Hummmm... Hummmm...



jeene laga hoon pehle se jyada,jeene laga hoon pehle se jyada pehle se jyada tumpe marne laga hun,main mera dil aur tum ho yahan,rehte ho aake jo tum paas mere,sochu main tham jaye pal yeh paas mere jab ho tum,jeene laga hoon,atif aslam,ramaiya vastavaiya,girish kumar songs,atif aslam hits,atif aslam songs,shruti haasan,girish kumar,prabhu deva,sachin jigar,girish kumar movies,ramaiya vastavaiya movie,atif aslam romantic songs,atif aslam best songs

snippet.title: Norway Chess 2026 | Final Round | Magnus vs Gukesh, Pragg vs Keymer
snippet.description:
The best selling ChessBase 26 + Mega Database 2026: https://shop.chessbase.in/products/chessbase-26-mega-database-2026-combo?_pos=2&_sid=4ff68d87a&_ss=r

Welcome to Norway Chess 2026 – one of the world’s most prestigious chess tournaments.

From May 25 to June 5, the world’s top chess stars battle it out in Oslo, Norway, at the iconic Deichman Bjørvika.

Featuring legends and elite grandmasters including Magnus Carlsen, Gukesh D, Praggnanandhaa, Alireza Firouzja, Wesley So, Vincent Keymer and more, this edition promises intense classical clashes, dramatic Armageddon tiebreaks, and unforgettable moments.

Norway Chess and Norway Chess Women continue with equal prize funds and the unique format where every match produces a winner.

Venue: Deichman Bjørvika, Oslo
Dates: May 25 – June 5, 2026

Reports from each day by Devansh Singh:
Day 0:  https://www.chessbase.in/news/norway-chess-2026-press-conference
Day 1: https://www.chessbase.in/news/norway-chess-2026-round-1-report
Day 2: https://www.chessbase.in/news/norway-chess-2026-round-2-report
Day 3: https://www.chessbase.in/news/norway-chess-2026-round-3-report

snippet.title: వేంకటేశ్వర స్వామి పాటలు | Venkateswara Swamy Songs | Suprabhatam with Lyrics | Govinda Namalu Telugu
snippet.description:
వేంకటేశ్వర స్వామి పాటలు | Venkateswara Swamy Songs | Suprabhatam with Lyrics | Govinda Namalu Telugu

Experience the divine grace of Lord Sri Venkateswara Swamy through this beautiful collection of devotional songs, Govinda Namalu, and Sri Venkateswara Suprabhatam with Lyrics. Listen with devotion and seek the blessings of Tirumala Srinivasa for peace, prosperity, happiness, and spiritual strength.

This devotional collection includes:
✨ Govinda Namalu Telugu
✨ Sri Venkateswara Suprabhatam
✨ Sri Venkatesha Stotram
✨ Venkateswara Manasasmarami
✨ Sri Venkateswara Ashtottaram
✨ Garuda Gamana Tava
✨ Venkateswara Chalisa

May Lord Venkateswara Swamy bless you and your family with good health, success, and abundance.

Govinda Govinda! Srinivasa Govinda! Venkataramana Govinda!

#VenkateswaraSwamySongs #GovindaNamalu #Suprabhatam #VenkateswaraSuprabhatam #GovindaNamaluTelugu

snippet.title: JCB Innova Truck Vs Horror JCB Tractor & Franklin In Indian Bike Driving 3d
snippet.description:
JCB Innova Truck Vs Horror JCB Tractor & Franklin In Indian Bike Driving 3D

In this video, you will see an epic and terrifying fight where JCB Innova Truck fights against Horror JCB Tractor and Franklin inside Indian Bike Driving 3D 😱🚛🔥

This mod brings horror action, crazy attacks, dangerous vehicle monsters, and unexpected moments inside the game. Watch till the end for full entertainment, suspense, and madness 💥

Enjoy intense fight, scary scenes, fast driving, colorful locations, and full action gameplay 😎

snippet.title: Kanda Sashti Kavasam 🙏 | Vetrivel Veeravel Murugan Songs | Powerful Lord Murugan Tamil Bhakti Songs
snippet.description:
Kanda Sashti Kavasam 🙏 | Vetrivel Veeravel Murugan Songs | Powerful Lord Murugan Tamil Bhakti Songs

00:00 Kanda Sashti Kavasam

Experience the divine power of Lord Murugan with this soulful collection of *Kanda Sashti Kavasam* and *Vetrivel Veeravel Murugan Songs*. These powerful Tamil bhakti songs are dedicated to Lord Murugan (Kartikeya), the symbol of courage, wisdom, and victory over evil.

*Kanda Sashti Kavasam* is one of the most sacred hymns that protects devotees from negative energies and brings peace, prosperity, and spiritual strength. Listening to these Murugan devotional songs regularly helps remove obstacles, fulfills wishes, and invokes divine blessings.

Immerse yourself in the भक्ती (bhakti) of Lord Murugan through these powerful chants and songs. Ideal for daily prayers, meditation, and especially during Sashti days, Tuesdays, and festivals like Skanda Sashti.

🔔 Don’t forget to Like, Share & Subscribe for more devotional content.

#murugan #kandasashtikavasam #vetrivelveeravel #murugansongs
